title: Weighted Averages
excerpt: Is there a way to use a dashboard to find weighted averages? My dashboard shows the average profit margin per scale/scope of a project. However, some of the projects are very tiny, and some of them are very massive. Any …

posts.author: carlylaine (Carly )
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to use a dashboard to find weighted averages? My dashboard shows the average profit margin per scale/scope of a project. However, some of the projects are very tiny, and some of them are very massive. Any idea how I could make this happen?

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Maybe try some sort of formula to find weight of project depeneding on some KPI’s. Then calculate avg of that
